scores.correctness_notes: YAML is structurally correct and complete: services with override/command/startup/environment/on-check-failure, checks with http/level/period/timeout/threshold, and log-targets with type/location/services/labels all match the gold standard pattern. on-success/on-failure directives are valid Pebble service fields.
